description:
Update Font Family to Support Polish Characters

Replace current fonts with typefaces that include full support for Polish language characters and diacritics throughout the application.

Requirements:
- Identify all current font declarations in the codebase (CSS, style files, design system)
- Select replacement fonts that include Polish special characters (ą, ć, ę, ł, ń, ó, ś, ź, ż and their uppercase variants)
- Update font-family declarations across all stylesheets and components
- Ensure fallback fonts also support Polish characters
- Test rendering of Polish text across different browsers and devices
- Verify font weights and styles (regular, bold, italic) all support Polish characters
- Update web font imports or local font files as needed
- Check that font loading performance is not negatively impacted
- Validate proper display of Polish characters in all UI contexts (buttons, headings, body text, form inputs)
